reference_summary:
Role Overview:
The Java Developer will design, develop, and maintain the back-end of large web-based applications using Java, Spring Boot, Kafka,

Key Responsibilities:
The job holder will design, develop, and maintain the back-end of large web-based applications using Java. They will participate in technical analysis, documentation, implementation, and integration, as well as test and manage early life support for core software tools and assets. The role requires attending daily Scrum events, including planning, retrospectives, and refinements. Additionally, the developer will attend meetings with Product Owners and clients to discuss technical impediments.

Required Skills:
- Experience with Java and Java Spring boot
- Experience in Kafka
- Experience with Mongo DB and Microservices
- Design, development, and maintenance of back-end large web-based applications
- Technical analysis, documentation, implementation, and integration
- Testing and managing early life support of core software tools and assets
- Participation in Scrum events (daily planning, retrospective, refinement)
- Ability to discuss technical impediments with Product Owners and/or Clients
- Fluent English

Tools and Technologies:
Java, Spring boot, Kafka, Mongo DB, Microservices

Experience Level:
Not explicitly stated.

job_description: Project Description Join our Development Center and become a member of our open minded progressive and professional team. We are currently seeking an Integration Specialist / DevOps. You will be expected to get up to speed with the domain and the standards of delivery quickly and ultimately be a significant contributor to the shared capability of the group. Responsibilities . plan evaluate migrate implement configure test and roll out third party applications into our client s environment software infrastructure with relevant IT controls. monitor usage and performance and troubleshoot server and software issues. assist our migration and re-platform applications to Cloud. plan maintain and communicate regular maintenance activities with key business and internal stakeholders. Work closely and effectively with other IT and operations teams across the organisation. Perform unit and integration tests of software components for integration into larger subsystems in accordance with the project s adopted standards. Applying standards methods techniques templates as defined by SDLC code repository handling code inspection penetration-avoidance etc. Mandatory Skills Description . 3+ years of hands-on technical skills in software management. Strong infrastructure knowledge and experience. Familiar with Azure ARM and Terraform templates is a plus . Gitlab CI 1 year experience. Docker containers troubleshooting. fluent in bash scripting. PostgreSQL basics. Knowledge of Java technology from environment setup perspective Maven is a plus . fluent English Nice-to-Have Skills . Kubernetes is a plus

job_description: TurnKey Labs is the most trusted offshore software development firm for innovative software startups and the venture capitalists that back them is looking for a dynamic marketing wizard to expand our marketing efforts and further fuel our customer acquisition. TurnKey has grown organically due to a great reputation and strong referral stream among customers. But now we are looking to accelerate our growth by hiring a creative and thoughtful marketing leader who can formalize our marketing processes and drive activities that generate additional customer leads. Reporting to TurnKey s CEO you will be leading all marketing activities of the company as we build a compelling brand for both of our core targets prospective customers and investors in the U.S. market and amazing software development talent locally in Ukraine. Why you should care Work with a fast growing Silicon Valley-based company. Build the foundation for TurnKey s marketing efforts and be a key decision-maker. Collaborate directly with TurnKey s founders two serial Silicon Valley entrepreneurs. Enjoy the freedom to be imaginative experiment widely and stop following the status quo. Propel your career in a work hard play hard culture where everyone s opinion counts. Key Responsibilities Create the marketing strategy Conduct target market analysis industry trends research and maintain ongoing competitive audit. In collaboration with senior management define marketing strategy target market segments key offerings value proposition and more. Refine corporate brand identity and positioning. Revise and improve current messaging. Implement and optimize the strategy Develop actionable plan for brand promotion and lead generation channels campaigns budgets and ROI targets . Coordinate with senior management on objectives leads and ROI on marketing activities. Collaborate with the recruitment team regarding marketing support for recruitment objectives. Develop and maintain marketing collateral website sales presentations case studies and more. Track marketing KPIs and optimizing activities to improve outcomes executive reporting. Create and execute an integrated digital strategy -. Maintain company presence on social media platforms LinkedIn Facebook Instagram DOU and create exciting and insightful content that breaks through the noise. -. Develop and execute digital ad strategies PPC SEO to attract website traffic and convert traffic to leads. -. Create content and content-driven lead generation campaigns. Experience 5+ years in marketing including 3+ years working directly at a software development outsourcing or offshoring firm. Strong understanding of key marketing concepts such as market segmentation value proposition differentiation buyer journey branding messaging etc. Experience in building marketing strategy and action plans for a software development outsourcer or offshore firm. Strong experience in digital marketing and content-driven lead generation. Proven experience in lead generation with measurable KPIs and ROI. Advanced level in written English. Advanced spoken English. Personality Type That Will Do Well In This Job You prize imagination and creativity. You like to think differently about problems and how to solve them. You are results-oriented and focused on winning. You love to be part of a close collaborative team. You enjoy having autonomy and independence. You are comfortable with uncertainty and rapidly changing priorities. Additional Benefits of the Job Strong professional and personal growth that will help accelerate your career progression. Tap into broader Silicon Valley ecosystem. Work closely with the founding team and learn from top American executives. Access to English courses or other training as needed/desired . Unlimited PTO for any reason including sick days no specified limits flexible work schedule Personal laptop MacBook Trainings certifications conferences Private health dental insurance Business trips to headquarters in Menlo Park Accounting and legal support required to file taxes. Remote/coworking work.

The goal of this project is to extend customer engineering teams performance security and help with management. Akvelon team will do PMs will manage mixed customers teams customer SDEs + ours Flow Team. Performance and optimization optimizing transactions on the chain not the resources used e.g. memory . job_description: Job Description The Creative Designer is a key position in Turnitin s Global Creative Services team. This person reports directly to the Creative Director but will also work with marketing teams and colleagues within the business. The position is responsible for taking briefs and developing on brand creative concepts that can be executed as integrated marketing campaigns across all media. This person partners closely with Designers Copywriters internally and externally employed to develop the most effective ways to visually position products services and solutions. Work with the Creative Director and wider Global Marketing team to deliver new ideas and projects for both new and existing campaigns. Responsible for developing creative concepts and design that work across all media including digital banners web social media print and video. Ensure that all design work follows corporate guidelines. Design of icons infographics ebooks and photo retouching. Create edit export assets for web banners product images blog content social posts. Digital animation for websites digital adverts social and videos. Participate in brainstorming content ideas as part of a wider creative team. Confidently present ideas to the customer and explain the methodology behind. Review project feasibility with an eye on balancing innovation with constraints on time and resources. Manage projects and ensure we hit deadlines and SLA targets. Has precise attention to detail with pixel-perfect accuracy. Qualifications Essential. Strong portfolio showing quality and diversity in the design techniques and styles you use. Fluent written and spoken English. 3+ years successful professional design experience preferably at a digital agency or in-house team. In-depth knowledge of Adobe Creative Suite. In particular Illustrator InDesign Photoshop and experience of After Effects and Animate. Good knowledge of Google slides and docs. Strong appreciation of typography colour and the effective use of space. Excellent communication skills and ability to collaborate in teams or independently. Excellent time management and project management. Desirable. Basic knowledge of CSS and HTML and an interest in UX and prototyping is desirable. Knowledge of CMS and able to publish updates to content. Experience of Figma. Experience of international multi-language projects. Experience in the creation of motion graphics videos is desirable but not essential to the role. Degree in digital design graphic design graphic communications or equivalent experience. Additional Information . A smart fun and casual environment where you can learn from and teach others. A great mission. you will be involved in building a distinct and recognizable global brand identity in the education market. We offer . Professional growth opportunity. Generous holiday allowance. Free English classes. Young and friendly team. Close-knit family atmosphere. Flexible schedule. Comfortable and modern office.

job_description: As a remote partner in our network you will participate in the creation of enterprise-class applications on the latest technology platforms using proven design patterns. This position requires a solid hands-on developer to fully participate in the software development process including design development unit testing and technical documentation. You will use the Scrum development methodology to create 21st-century software solutions that set standards. On top of that you can work from anywhere in the world and receive competitive pay. About The Project Our LAMP FE team is looking to hire a Senior Software Developer experienced in React Native to join a project in the veterinary care industry that offers innovative clinical solutions related to advanced diagnostics and treatment. You ll have the opportunity to participate in the creation of diverse web applications improving pets health and well-being by using proven design patterns and the latest technology platforms. What You ll Do . Participate in the architecture design and development phase of software production. Participate successfully in an established daily Scrum process. Manage personal work tasks for optimized software delivery. Deliver high-quality software with extensive Unit Testing. Communicate with foreign team members and clients. Be responsible for developing and testing critical components of the system. Collaborate closely with the team in designing software and hardware. Build polished cross-browser web-based user interface What You ll Need . 2+ years of experience with React Native. Proficiency in TypeScript. Hands-on experience in mobile app distribution AppStore Google Play . Ability to build mobile user interfaces with a native look. A passion for building great software. Advanced English both written and verbal Conditions . 100 remote work. Full-time employment. The work schedule is flexible nevertheless as a team we need to meet at some time so we would want you to be able to join and be available for meetings until 8 PM GMT+2 when necessary. Work in a team of professionals so we expect the same from you. Access to the most up-to-date industry tools and software. We use OpenAir for timesheet management. If you have reliable internet you can work from anywhere in the world Selection process . 30-minute interview with Recruitment Consultant. Interview with HR. Technical Interview If this sounds like your kind of thing we want to talk to you

job_description: We the aqua cloud team are professionals and enthusiasts creating cool and useful products with a focus on QA for IT teams to make IT product development easier and more reliable. Hundred of companies in the market have been using our products for over 6 years. from small start-ups to IT giants banks and municipal organizations. To continue product development and successful expansion into new markets we are looking for a QA Automation specialist to help develop our QA processes and achieve 100 test automation. Join our team Your responsibilities will include . Perform system functional data integration user acceptance performance API and regression testing of our complex web solutions aqua DrivT . Create and update test documentation . Develop and continuously improve automated tests . Work in a dynamic agile-based environment . Implement testing procedures and monitor the quality assurance process . Collaborate with other team members to improve the efficiency of testing processes. We expect from you . 3+ years of experience in manual testing of web applications . At least 1 year of experience in test automation building frameworks and developing testing tools . English proficiency of at least B1 level. the ability to communicate with the international team orally and in writing . Hands-on experience with testing artifacts test plan test design test case test script . Passion for quality and in-depth knowledge of quality assurance methodologies and tools . Knowledge of basic principles of the modern software development process version control systems issue tracking continuous integration etc . Experience in WEB and API testing . Test automation languages C# Typescript Python are preferable. Experience with .NET PowerShell and Selenium . Experience with CI / CD BDD Gherkin will be a plus. We offer . Work in a stable and constantly growing German IT company . 100 remote . Salary in Euros . Challenging tasks and an opportunity to build your test framework based on the technologies you choose . No bureaucracy a healthy friendly positive atmosphere . Public holidays in accordance with your national work calendar . Paid vacation. 4 weeks per year compensation sick leave. up to 5 days per year.

job_description: Company Background Helpware is a technology-driven American company with offices in the USA Poland Germany Albania Georgia Ukraine Mexico Philippines and Uganda providing Customer Experience Operational Support services for modern companies. Our team of professionals is driven by the purpose of delivering best-in-class value-adding solutions to our partners by leveraging our empowered teams innovative solutions and technologies. What is the role about Ensures passing service levels for each Operations account by engaging in real-time management of the queue. Responds to and acts as the central point of communication in all events and of circumstances impacting account performance. What awaits you in this role Updates and processes data for real-time performance analysis. Obtains quantifiable performance figures i.e. call volume AHT running service level in order to make critical recommendations to address account performance issues. Manages and monitors the queue for the Operations account against the attainment of passing service levels. Keenly observes the queue and proactively responds with action plans for the account s activities by continually communicating with Team Captains and Operations Management. Acts as the central point of communication regarding account performance by cascading vital information to key decision-makers. Escalates relevant information on account performance to Management and ensures proper document on major incidents. Keeps abreast of new policies and procedures addressing day-to-day issues of specific accounts. Provides information on key issues and challenges in attaining service levels and devises necessary responses to resolve such matters. Occasionally conducts training for Team Captains in order to equip them with the necessary skills for real-time queue management. Conducts training for new hires or as required for Operations. Other related tasks assigned by managers of the Clients and/or Helpware Who are we looking for At least one 1 year of Workforce Management experience within the call center / customer service industry. Formal training in Workforce Management i.e. real-time data analysis queue management preferred. Previous call center operations experience preferred. Time and project management skills. Excellent oral and written communication skills. Fluency in the English language. B2 + English level Adaptive to changing work schedules working hours and site assignments. Customer orientation. Problem-Solving Decision-Making and Analytical skills. Presentation skills. Attention to detail.Skills and Qualifications Previous experience in data entry will be a huge plus Advanced Excel user will be plus Highly organized displays time management skills Ability to learn fast and to perform in a dynamic environment. Must possess effective organizational and time management skills strong leadership skills Amenable to work on the night shift/shifting schedule Solutions minded and results oriented Excellent working ethics Technical Skills Basic knowledge of workforce management processes concepts and principles i.e. staffing projections scheduling service level analysis metrics monitoring . Prior knowledge of client specifics i.e. nature of account metrics and of ACD / PABX and workforce management software systems preferred. Working knowledge of call center operations and organization. Proficiency with MS Office applications i.e. MS Word Excel as well as call center-specific software and applications i.e. Baleen BluePumpkin CentreVu NICE iEX Verint etc .

job_description: Do you love working with sophisticated systems having system level overview from architecture level till deployment and clearly share your ideas with others Are you driven to achieve your best and enjoy working to improve the future We re looking for a performance engineer who love challenges and can deal with complex requirements and various components to get the most performance out of our network interface controllers NICs and SmartNICs . What you ll be doing Analysis and diagnostics of bottlenecks in the most advance systems in the industry and in our Silicon. Working closely with different HW and SW groups to acquire optimal solutions. Define performance tests for new features making sure our NIC is able to reach its limits calculating expected results. Development and maintenance of automation tools and infrastructure to provide the best performance reports Ensure no regression is present between releases. Using strong communication skills build and drive architecture analysis documents and communications to internal and/or external audiences about our technology. What we need to see Bachelor s degree in Computer Science / Software Engineering / Computer engineering or equivalent. 2+ years experience in SW/HW engineering. Strong communication skills and positive thinking. Understanding of multi core hardware operating systems design concurrency virtual memory caching interrupts device drivers. Experience with design and development software. Self-learning delving into new areas fast. Highly organized and driven with the ability to work in a dynamic environment across multiple countries and time zones. Ways to stand out from the crowd Previous experience as a performance engineer. Strong Python and scripting skills. Experience with debugging. NVIDIA is widely considered to be one of the technology world s most desirable employers. We have some of the most forward-thinking and hardworking people in the world working for us. We are looking for a performance engineer to analyze bottlenecks, define performance tests, and develop automation tools to get the most performance out of network

Key Responsibilities:
You will analyze and diagnose bottlenecks in advanced systems and silicon while collaborating with hardware and software groups to achieve optimal solutions. Your duties include defining performance tests for new features to ensure network interface controllers reach their limits and calculating expected results. You will develop and maintain automation tools and infrastructure to provide performance reports and ensure no regressions occur between releases. - SmartNICs
- Silicon
- Automation tools

job_description: On behalf of our client from France Mobilunity is looking for a DevOps Engineer to maintain and develop the infrastructure and support the deployment. Our Сlient connects millions of buyers and merchants around the world to unlock cross-border trade. The company provides advanced international marketing solutions for ecommerce retailers and brands seeking to grow their businesses globally. Using a suite of automated localization tools merchants can quickly launch their stores on international markets and promote them to new audiences with Google Shopping Ads with a hosted international checkout solution allowing buyers to complete orders with local shipping payment methods. Responsibilities . building and setting up new development tools and infrastructures . working on ways to automate and improve development and release processes . ensuring that systems are safe and secure against cybersecurity threats identifying technical problems and developing software updates and fixes . working with software engineers to ensure that development follows established . processes and works as intended planning out projects and being involved in project management decisions . providing operational support of the applications in production . you will be required to perform occasional on call duties once every other month . close work with Development teams on working on best CI/CD solutions. Must have skills 3+ years of experience in a similar role Experience with Kubernetes Experience with AWS services EC2 S3 RDS IAM EKS ElasticCache Experience with Ansible Vault Terraform Experience with CI/CD fx based on Jenkins Gitlab or similar Knowledge about Python Perl or Bash Willingness to carry out all responsibilities related to DevOps and system administration Upper-Intermediate English skills. Nice to have skills Experience with GCP. In return we offer The friendliest community of like-minded IT-people Open knowledge-sharing environment exclusive access to a rich pool of colleagues willing to share their endless insights into the broadest variety of modern technologies Mobilunity Medical Insurance program designed to attend our teams needs Paid vacations and sick leaves including 5 paid days per year that don t require a sick note Fair salary and 100 taxes coverage don t worry about possible taxes raise we will get you covered Perfect office location in the city-center 900m from Lukyanivska metro station with a green and spacious neighborhood or remote mode engagement you can choose a convenient one for you with a possibility to fit together both No open-spaces setup separate rooms for every team s comfort and multiple lounge and gaming zones on all of the 3 floors English classes in 1-to-1 group modes with elements of gamification Neverending fun sports events tournaments music band multiple affinity groups Come on board and let s grow together

job_description: We are looking for a Digital Lead to focus on strategy UX/UI design and tailored development solutions. The Digital Lead will report directly to the CEO manage a group of 4-5 project managers and oversee full development teams and life cycles. This position is Director level. Overall responsibilities include strategic planning assuring quality delivery in a growing agency environment monitoring key account relationships and accelerating team performance. Be an inspiring leader and mentor for the team members and a trusted advisor for the clients. What you ll need . Minimum 5+ years of agency experience managing multiple teams and projects simultaneously with a growth track record. Experience with one or more in the following fields UX/UI planning website analysis and strategies very tech savvy with strong understanding of development process PHP custom theme WordPress sites eCommerce . Entrepreneur mindset. Able to fully decompose digital challenges project goals and propose innovative solutions. Ability to analyze RFPs understand digital assets and have the competency to put together scope of work documentation based on client requirements. Strong understanding of websites/applications/e-Commerce and full-cycle project delivery. Sometimes roll up your sleeves and solve difficult tasks and situations and be a leader for the project teams. Excellent communication skills ability to communicate clearly and confidently both verbally and written. Fluent/Native in English. Superior organizational/follow-up skills with effective capacity to coordinate and prioritize multiple tasks without compromising attention to detail. Energetic and self-motivated with keen ability to maintain order in a fast-paced professional environment. Have the drive and vision to grow with a rapidly growing digital agency. Understanding of technical details and the ability to articulate to technical and non-technical personnel. Strong analytical skills and ability to make decisions recommendations and conclusions based upon data. Computer literacy requirements Outlook Word Excel PowerPoint GitHub Clickup Basecamp Slack other PM tools. Creative problem solving using logic and reasoning as used in programming. Work is flexible general work hours are 11am-8pm CET. For Bonus Points . An agency ex-executive / ex-director ex-owner . Previously UX/UI designer turned into management role ex-developer turned into management role a super tech savvy person with digital strategy knowledge . Experience working with US clients and having US-based education / work experience

job_description: Using their SaaS cloud platform broadcasters and content owners can develop and launch apps OTT services or integrate selected modules and functionalities such as engagement and interactivity into third-party apps. Apps powered by this platform are used by millions of viewers worldwide every day. They proudly count among its customers ProSiebenSat.1 Television Academy Viacom Baby First and many more. The Frameworks team is in charge of the core platform of our product. They develop APIs and SDKS in JavaScript iOS and Android which allows implementation teams and external developers to build rich mobile and TV applications. The team is responsible for the core UI framework which provides the building blocks for mobile and OTT apps. Responsibilities You will develop rich mobile and TV applications using the unique React Native framework. You will architect design and develop core APIs to be used by internal and external teams. Participate and lead research and design of various framework and end-user components. You will use your familiarity with recent technologies and practices to develop client-side infrastructural systems and integrate them into existing ones. You will be responsible for the end-to-end development of your work from research and design to automated testing and quality control Requirements 3+ years of experience in developing mobile applications iOS Android web-based 2+ years of experience in React Native Experience working with Typescript Deep understanding of JavaScript and strong capabilities of performance optimizations and debugging. Experience in Open source environment JSON for client-server communication high version control skills with emphasis on git Meaningful experience working on large complex systems. Ability to take extreme ownership over your work. Every day is a challenge to ensure you are performing to the expectations you and your team have agreed upon in regards to estimates and to the general process. An understanding of React Native best practices and a commitment to following them. Ability to work through new and difficult React Native issues and contribute to libraries as needed. Ability to create and maintain continuous integration and delivery of React Native applications. Self-management in an agile environment Good communication in English ideally Upper-Intermediate or higher Nice to have Experience developing TV apps Apple TV Android TV Samsung Tizen . Experience working with Swift Kotlin digital video compression packaging distribution and automated testing. We offer Competitive salary depending on your experience Professional development opportunities Study and practice of English courses and communication with colleagues and clients from different countries Yoga classes Compensation package paid vacation sick leaves Flexible working hours from 9-11 to 18-20 Comfortable office or possibility to work remotely

job_description: UST Global is looking for a highly-skilled experienced .Net Lead Software Engineer. Responsibilities Top level expert in one or more highly specialized areas of applications systems analysis and programming. Leads the solution delivery and implementation for programs and projects Interfaces with product owners and key stakeholders Works and implements an agile/scrum DevOps processes continuous integration and automated testing frameworks. Troubleshoot and resolve performance issues in the server components DB components and UI. Works with Product Team to ensure user stories that are developer-ready easy to understand and testable. Writes custom code or scripts to do destructive testing to ensure adequate resiliency in production. Adheres to maintenance plans/timelines project plans/timelines support plan summaries and production requirements documents. Participates and leads in learning activities around modern software design and development core practices communities of practice . Keep abreast of the current technologies and technological trends. Ability to learn and prototype new technologies and recommend their appropriate use within the Company products. Reviews and discusses code from more senior engineers to understand best practices and design patterns. Increases business acumen by learning about other parts of the business. May be responsible for providing technical leadership in multiple phases of a project ensuring coordination of assignments to IT resource management and escalating key decision points that deviate from the provided technical direction. Participates in design and review of technical design for development staff. Utilizes agile project management tools and concepts to ensure projects are delivered on time and on budget. Maintain knowledge of development methods best practices and standards. Work closely with IT Security for to ensure all systems internally hosted cloud-based etc. follow industry standards and policies for safe-guarding data and access. Requirements Extensive knowledge and understanding of computer systems architecture and design computer industry trends and project management. Minimum 7+ years experience in development. Need to have experience in Production Support. Expert on cloud technologies Azure O365 AWS SharePoint 2013+ .NET Core and Dynamics Ability to develop new systems with .NET / / ASP.NET / C#.NET / SQL Server / Microsoft CRM Web Services Expert knowledge of Languages C# Visual Basic .NET F# C++ .NET Strong knowledge of C# .Net framework Asp.Net and MVC. Strong knowledge of OOAD and multi-tier architectures including MVC/MVP/MVVM design patterns. Strong knowledge of web services WCF REST and SOA Architecture. Knowledge with MS Entity Framework. Strong knowledge of MVC GUI design including the ability to incorporate JQuery JavaScript and CSS plus expertise with AJAX/SPA. Expertise with tools such as MS SQL Studio PL/SQL Developer / Toad etc. Strong analytical problem solving and planning skills. Excellent interpersonal and communication skills. Ability to multi-task in a fast-paced environment. Team player who is flexible delivery-oriented and takes responsibility for the team s success. Enthusiastic attitude with the drive to continually learn and improve. Ability to understand business needs and conceptualize and implement information systems that support those business strategies. Experience working within an agile framework like Scrum based development organization. Thorough knowledge of departmental procedures processes and work flows. Knowledge of standard languages coding methods company coding standards and quality requirements. Excellent oral and written communication skills required. Demonstrated abilities to successfully document and communicate software platform designs to all levels of staff technical and non-technical . Ability to work constructively with other technical experts in a group setting. Knowledge of object-oriented development languages and web-related technologies. Ability to comprehend the consequences of various problem situations and address them or refer them for appropriate decision making. Ability to effectively exchange information clearly and concisely and present ideas reports facts and other information and respond to questions as appropriate. Demonstrated leadership abilities. Ability to make competent independent decisions. Ability to manage technical services and software vendors. Ability and proficiency in the use of project management tools and techniques. Ability to maintain confidentiality. We offer Possibility to influence the development of the project Friendly professional staff and warm atmosphere The environment where you can implement your ideas Flexible schedule and opportunities to work remotely 8 hours workday Paid vacation and sick leaves Participation in educational activities and thematic conferences Team parties and corporate events

Solid understanding of VPN OpenVPN and PPTP understanding of the OSI model . B1/B2 Visa for the USA it will not disqualify the candidate . Availability to overlap at least 6 hours with Eastern Timezone business hours 8 am to 5 pm . Important Soft Skills . Ability to conduct technological analyses and research . Leadership and organizational abilities . Strategic thinking and problem-solving aptitude . Ability to actively communicate inspire and motivate all levels of staff . Ability to think and act strategically and proactively . Strong communication presentation skills working with executives and customers . Good at problem-solving training others. Responsibilities . Analysis design and development of tests and test-automation suites . Designing and developing a processing platform using various configuration management technologies . Testing software development methodology in an agile environment . Maintaining supporting and enhancing existing systems and platforms . Collaborating with business users project managers and other engineers to achieve elegant solutions that suit all parties . Providing recommendations for continuous improvement . Working as part of a team that strives to elevate technology and consistently apply best practices . Enhancing the existing system through new initiatives and programs . Writing technical documentation that is accessible to colleagues partners and end-users . Leading embedded development initiatives with peer engineers . Channelling feedback from others into the product development strategy to drive improvements.

job_description: Credolab is seeking an experienced Graphic Designer that can work with our marketing team to create stunning visuals for marketing purposes online and offline and evolve Credolab s brand as we launch our products in more countries. As part of the marketing team you will need to take our story and spirit and translate it into a visual medium. This is an exciting time to join us and make a difference in the alternative credit scoring space as a Senior Graphic Designer. You will own Credolab s visual and brand identity while also being responsible for creating recognisable and distinctive visuals that drive Credolab s mission forward. What You ll Do Take ownership of in-house projects from concept through to completion. Design all visual materials needed for public-facing channels web social paid display PR and more. Develop landing pages presentation decks sales sheets digital media kits emails as well as PDF guides whitepapers ebooks and case studies. Help to improve and evolve the existing design and strategic direction of our brand Design and resize ad units branded units social media visuals and various web visuals. Have a desire to learn and drive yourself to deliver the best quality of work quickly pixel perfect in every way. Have an ability to create work under minimal supervision and package and present solutions to the team. Do it quickly and superbly. Partner with other stakeholders in the organisation around creative and brand positioning Research evolving best practices and artistic standards in fintech and related industries Educate yourself with dedicated time to learn new tools and techniques illustration UI/UX landing pages etc. What You Should Bring 2-3+ years of experience in graphic design in a professional capacity. Knowledge of visual digital spaces UI/UX websites and landing pages and how to leverage social media platforms. Expertise in Adobe Creative Suite Photoshop Illustrator etc. Detail-oriented. a sharp eye and knowledge of layout typography composition colour and hierarchy. Ability to initiate creative ideas from process to execution independently whilst reporting back to the Head of Marketing. A growth mindset and comfort in regularly delivering and receiving peer feedback. Take the initiative to create new concepts and ideas and think outside the box. Has a strong grasp of contemporary design aesthetics trends and emerging technologies. Creativity with an inspiring portfolio of design projects Plenty of patience and empathy. One who cares deeply about diversity and inclusion. Fluent in written and spoken English. Bonus If You Have It s not required to have experience working remotely but is considered a plus. Basic animation video and web UI/UX work a major plus or a ton of desire to learn it. Knowledge of front-end development languages such as HTML CSS JavaScript etc. Video caption video editing motion graphic or animation production Experience with Figma Sketch Adobe XD etc. A strong command of copywriting What we offer Competitive package Flexible working arrangements Remote working environment Fast-growing entrepreneurial set-up with global exposure

job_description: Our teams are composed of Project Manager UI/UX designer Systems Architect Software Engineers DevOps and Quality Engineers. Engineering team is based in the US and Eastern Europe. We work in sprints Requirements testing performed by QA team before each sprint - testing attributes are prepared checklists testing data test cases - completed task verification and testing Backend first testing approach on qa environment - test report prepared and shared - tested sprint tasks uploaded to staging environment - tasks verification on staging environment - analyzing client feedback after user acceptance testing . You are expected to Review documentation and analyse requirements. Plan and estimate testing activities. Design test plans scenarios scripts and procedures. Report and document technical issues report bugs and errors to development teams. Create test cases. Perform manual Functional Regression Exploratory and Scalability testing Web Mobile . Conduct post-release/ post-implementation testing. Monitor applications and software systems. Present findings to software development and business user teams. Effectively collaborate with team members to achieve the best results. You need to have hands-on experience and good understanding of 2+ years industry experience in QA or Software Engineering. Testing processes methodologies and standards. Testing Web and Mobile Applications. Cross-browser cross-device testing. Software release procedures and defect tracking test planning and execution. Relational and no-SQL databases. MySQL PostgreSQL MongoDB. Postman and Swagger. Upper-Intermediate level of English or higher. Hiring process We value your time and ours and make the process fast and easy. Interview with HR hiring manager and QA Engineer small test challenge optional Interview with CTO Offer. Compensation Up to 3000 annual salary review. We have been a 100 remote company since 2012. Strong positive engineering culture tightly knit team of professionals with a good sense of humor. You will become a better QA. Guaranteed. Flexible working hours you can choose when you can start working 9 AM Good. 1 PM That s ok for us. Paid Time Off 15 days off per year during the first 3 years further increasing to 20 days in later years + 10 National Holidays. Other benefits you will have Hardware upon business needs. Unlimited access to the courses on the pluralsight.com assistance in obtaining certifications. Library of books. If you are still here please find examples of projects you could and should join We re building a SaaS business for a construction company from Boston helping to comply with safety regulations at the construction sites. The goal is to reduce injuries at work caused by operating large and dangerous construction equipment bulldozers graders etc. The product includes a native mobile application for iOS and Android as well as the Web App for the back office. A Medical start-up from Boston spent the last 5 years developing a new kind of breathing and heart rate sensors that do not need to be worn on the body. NineTwoThree is building an IoT platform that collects data from sensors calculates the baseline and sends notifications to medical personnel and relatives if indicators get out of norm. Our own 7th startup. a virtual event platform that focuses on interactivity to keep participants interested and engaged. Challenges are Streaming video conferencing group discussions one-on-one sessions watch parties polls announcement chats and more.

job_description: The Project The new POD of 5 Java engineers we are building at the moment will join an already existing team of 15 people that are currently working from Israel. The project is already ongoing and the new team will join them to help with new ideas and adding new features to work on developing it into a bigger and central area. Basically few major projects they want to do to make it happen. The team will be exposed to high complexity and great traffic of users. This project is not for internal usage of the Client but the main goal is to create these new platforms focusing on driving things for the users of this e-commerce platform. It is project e-commerce and SEO related. The Team This is an independent team so the Client is looking for developers with a solid background working with end-to-end development with a great big picture of the whole process once they re going to be part not only of the day to day development path but will also be responsible to test the quality for the project by themselves. The Client really values the knowledge of Java algorithms and a person that knows how to deal with different logic approaches to solving issues and bugs. The ideal candidate will have strong hands-on core Java and Java Web programming skills excellent problem solving and design skills and the ability to work collaboratively within different teams. The candidate should also demonstrate a history of on-time delivery excellent communication and a positive get-it-done attitude. Experience working in Agile-driven development projects is a plus. The Tech Stack Java versions from 8 beyond Microservices Algorithms Spring frameworks specially Springboot JUnit JBehave Mockito Test containers etc Requirements. 6+ years of Java experience while 1+ years of tech/team leadership experience. Experience with the latest version of Java. Experience with Spring framework. Experience with OO design and design patterns. Experience in building Restful services. Good understanding of using various database systems NoSQL and relational at scale. Drive architecture discussions produce well-documented design docs and participate in design and code reviews. Partner effectively and influence peers juniors and seniors both within the organization. Flexibility and passion to learn new domains. Experience in working with agile development methodologies and scrum master role Benefits. Flexible working hours. You can work remotely from the office or mix both. Separate room for every team and spacious technically equipped workplace. Close to park location. Regular Performance Appraisal. Free English courses. Corporate doctor. Access to online courses. Corporate events and so on

job_description: We are Zibra AI. a young startup whose mission is to unleash the potential of a modern game engine and bring a new level of physics performance and realism for all game developers. We have already developed and shipped Zibra Liquids plugin in Unity asset store which enables new level of fluid realtime simulation and we work on a set of new technologies which will accelerate and improve rendering in Unreal Engine. We need a skilled and motivated team member who wants to help us create the first ever ML driven render pipeline in Unreal Engine. Our core technology can boost many engine stages like SSAO Shadows Global Illumination and many others. If you are interested in creating new approaches in 3D. you are welcome. Requirements . 2+ years of experience with Unreal Engine . 2+ years of experience C++ . Deep knowledge in graphics pipeline . Strong understanding of modern graphics techniques . Knowledge of shader languages HLSL/GLSL . Experience in the development of game for any platform . Experience with mobile is a plus. Responsibilities . Research new approaches for lighting techniques like Global Illumination SSAO Shadows etc. Port these features on mobile using Neural Processing Units.

job_description: Requirements . Minimum 3 years at HR Advisors level. Business acumen of HR industry trends understanding of IT business peculiarities. Proven ability to facilitate persuade influence and build credibility with all levels. Change Agent expert. Strong Leadership and Communication skills. Consultancy skills specifically analysis and providing solutions. Ability to prioritize and effectively manage between day-to-day requests and proactively driving strategic people issues. Can develop ad hoc interventions and engage decision making stakeholders behind required actions. Advanced English both written and spoken. Responsibilities . Own the partnership between Senior Business Leaders and the HR BP function to develop integrated solutions deliver value-added service. Lead a Team of HR Business Partners - Analyze trends and HR metrics in partnership with the business to develop solutions programs and policies which cover business needs. Consult the Senior Business Leaders on strategic and operational people management issues. Create from scratch improve and interpret human resources policies to company management. Manage and resolve complex employee relations issues. Provide guidance on delivery unit restructure workforce planning and succession planning. Drive and contribute to Global HR Projects and Initiatives. Build trustful and cooperative relationships with all internal functions What We Offer Exciting Projects Come take your place at the forefront of digital transformation With clients across all industries and sectors we offer an opportunity to participate in creating market-defining products using the latest technologies. Collaborative Environment Expand your skills by collaborating with a diverse team of highly talented people in an open laidback environment or even abroad in one of our global centers or client facilities Work-Life Balance GlobalLogic prioritizes work-life balance which is why we offer flexible opportunities and options. Professional Development Our dedicated Learning Development team regularly organizes certification and technical / soft skill training to help you realize your professional goals. Excellent Benefits We provide our consultants with competitive compensation and benefits Fun Perks We want you to love where you work which is why we host sports classes cultural social and team building activities such as sports competitions and end-of-year corporate parties. Our vibrant offices also include dedicated GL Zones and rooftop decks where you can drink coffee or tea with your colleagues over a game of table football or darts About GlobalLogic GlobalLogic is a full-lifecycle product development services leader that combines chip-to-cloud software engineering expertise and vertical industry experience to help our customers design build and deliver their next-generation products and digital experiences. We expertly integrate design complex engineering and agile delivery capabilities to deliver superior business outcomes for global brands in telecom automotive healthcare technology media and entertainment manufacturing and semiconductor industries. Headquartered in Silicon Valley GlobalLogic unites over 18 000 designers and engineers across the globe. Analysts like NASSCOM and Zinnov have recognized us for being a top company in our field and we are consistently nominated as a preferred company by both global HR consulting firms and local boards. By creating an environment that is exciting and flexible and by fostering growth through ongoing learning and development programs we empower our consultants to achieve both their professional and personal goals. At GlobalLogic we make amazing products and careers.

job_description: Job Description We are looking for an ambitious Senior Talent Acquisition Specialist with whom we can build the most impressive staffing process. Are you a self-starter Apply for a vacancy and let s get to know each other better We expect our successful candidate to Manage full cycle hiring process search select and headhunt suitable candidates in accordance with the Job Description and Recruitment process . You will work on 6-8 vacancies per month Create a competitive pipeline of highly qualified professionals for current and future staffing needs using active recruitment methods Source passive and active candidates via various sources in globe Create/update attractive job descriptions together with hiring managers Work with recruitment tools Jira etc In this role you will work on Business/Corporate vacancies in the globe and in specific locations in Europe. You will also be responsible for implementing best-of-the best practices and ideas that are directed to hiring the best candidates. Qualifications 3+ years of full-cycle recruiting International experience Strong interpersonal and consultative skills Ability to work in a team as well as independently Advanced user of recruiting technologies Google X-Ray search Linkedin etc Strong presentation and communication skills ability to conduct negotiations with customers Ready for quickly changing environment Can assess a candidate s fit for a role and sell them on the opportunity and knows the importance of learning the candidate s motivations and craft a dialogue that leads to a yes decision Upper-Intermediate+ English Will be a plus iGambling experience What we propose Ample space for the implementation of your ideas and offbeat solutions Challenging tasks in the international professional environment Opportunities for professional growth Flexible schedule 24 paid vacation days 4 days off national holidays and vacation days Ability to work remotely
reference_summary:
Role Overview:
The Senior Talent Acquisition Specialist will manage the full-cycle hiring process for 6-8 Business and Corporate vacancies per month

Key Responsibilities:
You will manage the full-cycle hiring process for 6-8 Business/Corporate vacancies per month, including searching, selecting, and headhunting candidates globally and in specific European locations. Your duties include sourcing passive and active candidates through various methods to build a competitive pipeline of highly qualified professionals for current and future needs. You will collaborate with hiring managers to create or update job descriptions, utilize recruitment tools like Jira, and implement best practices to attract top talent. Additionally, you will assess candidate fit, identify their motivations, and conduct negotiations to secure successful hires.

Required Skills:
* 3+ years of full-cycle recruiting experience.
* International recruiting experience.
* Proficiency in managing the full cycle hiring

Tools and Technologies:
Jira, Google X-Ray search, Linkedin

Experience Level:
3+ years of full-cycle recruiting
International experience
iGambling experience (plus)

job_description: Project the platform is simplifying the investment research process and allows investment managers to be more productive. Your key responsibilities . Perform releases across client clusters in Kubernetes using helm. Create graphs with time series metrics collected from application and system monitoring tools. Supporting Customer Success Team with resolving impacting issues and bug tickets. Documenting and automating the ongoing resolution steps in runbooks. Create automation scripts for infrastructure deployments using terraform/bash/sql/powershell . Assist Principal Systems Engineer with SecOps related duties. Requirements . 3+ years of experience as a site reliability engineer architect or equivalent professional roles . Experience with Docker and cluster management in Kubernetes or Docker-swarm . Strong practical Linux and Windows-based systems administration skills in a Cloud or Virtualized environment . Experience building complex Helm charts for Kubernetes . Experience with PostgreSQL and Microsoft SQL Server . Extensive and current experience with AWS or Azure Cloud services EC2 Elastic Beanstalk RDS CloudWatch . Experience building sophisticated and highly automated infrastructure for distributed processing systems . Experience with seamless/automated build scripts used to release management across all environments . Experience with building Dockerfiles for web and api applications Nice to have . Extensive experience building graphs and defining time-series metrics using Prometheus and Grafana . Experience capturing logs with Loki or Logstash and converting the tagged metrics to graphs . Extensive knowledge of network topology. Extra points for Traefik mesh networks Additional requirements . Upper-Intermediate English To apply contact me in Telegram Valeriia_CheIT

Intermediate understanding of customer services and business processes. Knowledge of Agile and automation processes. Main Responsibilities . Managing the QA team. Managing the creation execution and maintenance of all test levels System Integration Acceptance Regression and Performance . Manage the creation and maintenance of effective and detailed test plans test cases feature checklists. Handling personal development plans for your subordinates. Checking the system for compliance with functional and non-functional requirements. Detecting and tracking platform defects and inconsistencies. Work closely with the development team. Previous experience working as a QA automation engineer. Writing automation scripts and implementing software applications. job_description: You are open to new ideas willing to work on challenging tasks ready to make them more modern and flexible and competitive enough in the market. Then our team is waiting for you. Customer Our customer holds leading positions in the Swedish and Danish public sectors as a high-quality IT product provider. Our cooperation with them has been successfully evolving for more than 12 years. During this time we established trustful and mutually respectful relations. Project It is a well-structured modern scalable and flexible business platform based on a Service Oriented Architecture SOA . The application has a wide range of standard functions and components and can be configured to support any organizations domain processes and business rules. One of the platform s primary purposes is to use in grants management and most of the grants in Denmark are managed through this platform. Our task is to make the solution modern and flexible and be more competitive and exceed expectations. Responsibilities Work closely with the team to ensure the achievement of project goals. Play supervisory advisory and coaching roles for the team. Contribute to the technical and software design decisions within and across all the teams. Since the product is complicated enough one of the first tasks and challenges will be to become acquainted with the current architecture on the level sufficient to make decisions. Ensure a successful migration to a microservices architecture and eliminate Biz Talk. Guarantee a migration of WCF SOAP services to REST architecture built with ASP.NET Core changing hosting model to Docker containers Requirements Must have 5+ years of professional software development experience on commercial-grade systems and applications Excellent knowledge of C# programming language and .NET platform .NET Framework 4.x .NET Core Strong OOP/OOD skills Hands-on experience with microservices SOA and REST Experience in API development using ASP.NET Web API ASP.NET Core Experience in database design and development MS SQL Server or similar RDBMS At least basic experience in Docker Experience in Agile software development processes Scrum Kanban Upper-Intermediate level of English Would be a plus Team Lead mentor role experience. Knowledge of JavaScript/TypeScript programming languages and proven experience in SPA development utilizing Angular or any other modern framework/library like React or Vue . Experience in ASP.NET Boilerplate and/or ASP.NET Zero frameworks WCF and/or ASMX technologies message-broker software RabbitMQ Kafka or similar BizTalk Server CI/CD configuration What we offer

Our customer helps rapidly growing brands acquire retain and delight their customers through SMS by leveraging our platform to deliver 98 open rates 50 response rates and 30 CTRs helping brands build meaningful one-to-one relationships with their customers. We are looking for senior PHP software engineers who can help us to build the next-generation messaging platform to automate conversations. job_description: About client Our client is one of the most innovative companies in its industry working exclusively with agile processes and the latest technologies. The team is characterized by short decision-making processes and joint suggestions for improvement. Your tasks You design and implement sophisticated scalable and customer-centric front-end components with modern JavaScript frameworks such as vue.js or React You develop scalable target-oriented and sustainable software architectures for the operationalization of complex customer journeys You link the individual components of our ecosystem to a holistic and sustainable overall solution You accompany the product development from solution finding to release to continuous operation in constant exchange with your product manager or product owner You enjoy working closely in a cross-functional team with pair programming code reviews and proactively share your knowledge and experience e.g. via coding dojos or tech talks to the team Your profile You have several years of professional experience in frontend development of web-based scalable systems and applications You have a good feeling for Responsive Design with consideration of speed and usability You have a good knowledge of current technologies e.g. React Angular and Vue and have already gained initial experience in connecting microservices with Rest You ideally already have basic knowledge in the development and interlocking of self-contained systems You like to think outside the box and are interested in other topics e.g. backend DevOps process optimization .. in addition to pure frontend development/architecture Your benefits Medical insurance training and continuing education employee discount company pension plan sports facilities on-site cafeteria and much more. About Scalors SCALORS is a German software outsourcing company which has development centers across Europe and recruits IT specialists all over the world for permanent employment in Germany Austria and Switzerland. We ve specialized in building cost-efficient software teams in Ukraine. Stay tuned for open vacancies on scalors.com

job_description: The project is a new platform for cross-media newsroom management targeted at medium-size and large publishing houses. It helps to plan appointments manage stories co-ordinate staff control beats and streamline cross-media workflows. The project is cluster-based in the cloud which is currently used by more than 380 organizations all over the World from USA to Australia . Stack of used technologies is large and consist of J2SE Angular Spring Hibernate REST Web services MySQL etc Docker Kubernetes Development process is based on TDD methodology together with Disciplined Agile practices. Quality assurance team provides the wide range of software testing services tests management bugs-tracking automation etc . Our Team consists of 12 members 1 Project Manager 1 Technical Lead 1 BA 7 Software Developers 4 QA Engineers. Krakow team consists of 5 members 2 DevOps 3 Software Developer. job_description: About the vacancy Our client is one of the world s top 10 investment companies with headquarters in Great Britain. They are building a data market that will aggregate and process data from multiple data feeds and systems like stock exchanges news feeds stock exchange brokers internal quantitative systems and others. The project related to a portfolio management solution based on microservices. You will be supporting and developing new features in a team of professionals which involves asset managers business analysts and quantitative developers. Together with 2 other specialists from DataArt you will form a team that will be transforming an old legacy WinForms application into a web microservice application with Angular frontend. The legacy application is not a good example of SOLID principles gives you lots of possibilities to make things right on the go. Must have. 2+ years of experience in developing commercial applications on the .NET platform. Experience in and understanding of C # including the latest versions ASP.NET ASP.NET MVC ASP.NET Web API. Knowledge of JavaScript HTML and JavaScript frameworks for example jQuery . Practical experience with MS SQL Server or PostgreSQL. Basic understanding of web services RESTful API. Basic understanding of design patterns. Good spoken English Would be a plus. Experience with Angular or React. Experience with WinForms or WPF. Experience with Kafka. Experience in the Finance domain or CFA certification. Experience in individual investments Узнайте больше о нашей политике равных возможностей в вопросах трудоустройства
